reviews.review_title: First thing you can't play with qwestpro
reviews.review_description: Idk because I can't play fix it pls

I bought it when it was on sale its kind of fun when there is players playing it but when there’s not, (most of the time) you’re just sitting in a lobby or playing against a random AI,￼ and I also doubt that the road map will be true because on their last game that they made filthy hands got left with no updates and  their “update board” is still stuck in April ⚠️

reviews.review_title: NO ONE IS PLAYING THIS GAME‼️
reviews.review_description: This game keeps disconnecting me from the game. There's no one playing this game. Keeps glitching. I was on the game for only 10 minutes when I tried to get a refund, and they won't give me one! SAVE YOUR MONEY‼️👈

developer_response.body: Hi! We do understand how you feel, consider that the game is in Early access and our player base is still growing! :) also we added a mode that you can play on your own, when you create a room, you can select the Overlord(bad guy) to be AI so you can play on your own or even with more friends. If you have doubts, or you want to give us your feedback please join us here https://discord.gg/NeskCeKk it very valuable for us!

reviews.review_title: The game just needs a few things
reviews.review_description: All it really needs to solve a few main issues which is if you don't have friends who don't play vr you can't play this and I think that a join random selection would make this game better as well as making the map bigger maybe adding different types of maps and the ability to control more than just zombies and you need faster movement and a more survival than a kinda shooter feel but other than those things you should buy the game just don't expect to Play immediately

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for the insight! Actually, I'd like to point out that you can play "single player"  right now. Just create a room, select the AI Overlord, and you can play by yourself or with 3 more friends against the bad guy! Anyway, this kind of feedback is great as we are still in Early Access. Why don't you join our Discord server and share more with us? https://discord.gg/44PRvn5t
Thank you for your very constructive feedback! Definitely going to incorporate some of your ideas into our next update!

reviews.review_description: it's really fun idk u should get it though, when you first join nothing really worked for me they might fix that later but if you leave it then join again then the fun awaits.
It need wer How much people in the lobby
When I first played it was so fun just to be the monster and just have fun so I recommend to just get the game now and have fun😎
I just bought the early access game and was trying to connect with my son game wasn’t working or wasn’t even connecting with my son. It looked really fun, but we didn’t get to enjoy it.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for playing! Were you able to join your son's room using a Room Code? How were you trying? In any case, why don't you join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/uhe95JbG so we can discuss it further? Thank you again!

reviews.review_description: This game is genuinely trash.Theres almost NEVER anyone online,and if there is its max 2 ppl. DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY PPL!!
Really nice gun physics, I like the concept of the game, nice and original, and smooth FPS, would recommend buying👍
I can't join anyone idk if anyone plays the game

I'm going to play it with my friends soon we've been
 waiting for it for nearly 3 months now

developer_response.body: Hey! Actually... You can play alone or with up to 3 friends! Make sure to check the auto overlord checkbox when you create a new game! And BTW, if you have feedback or questions come join our discord server! https://discord.gg/BhHmvzDz

reviews.review_description: It was fun but the left arm is kinda laggy but it is super fun
Reminds me of repo and repo is good👍
